memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag xml, StylesExtractor styles_extractor, NumberingExtractor numbering_extractor, FootnoteExtractor footnote_extractor, FootnoteExtractor endnote_extractor, str uid)
memberdef.name: __init__

detaileddescription.para: :param xml: BeautifulSoup tree with paragraph properties :param styles_extractor: StylesExtractor :param numbering_extractor: NumberingExtractor :param uid: unique paragraph id based on file hash and paragraph xml

briefdescription.para: Makes the list of paragraph's runs according to the style hierarchy: properties in styles -> direct properties (paragraph, character) 1) documentDefault (styles.xml) 2) tables (styles.xml) 3) paragraphs styles (styles.xml) 4) numbering styles (styles.xml, numbering.xml) 5) characters styles (styles.xml) 6) paragraph direct formatting (document.xml) 7) numbering direct formatting (document.xml, numbering.xml) 8) character direct formatting (document.xml)
If the paragraph is a list item applies its properties to the paragraph.

detaileddescription.para: Adds numbering run to the list of paragraph runs. :returns: numbering run if there is the text in numbering else None

briefdescription.para: Make runs of the paragraph and adds them to the paragraph list.
